visuals.title: Effect of Erosion and Dilation on a Binary Object
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Effect of Erosion and Dilation on a Binary Object
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Erosion and Dilation</text>
  <rect x="50" y="50" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Erosion
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="250" y="50" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="300" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Dilation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <line x1="150" y1="90" x2="270" y2="90" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="210" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Morphological Operations
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="50" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Image Erosion
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="250" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="300" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Image Dilation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>

diagrams.title: Effect of Erosion and Dilation on a Binary Object

nodes.label:
Erosion (A ⊖ B)
- Removes outer layer
- Shrinks object
- Breaks thin connections

Dilation (A ⊕ B)
- Adds outer layer
- Expands object
- Fills small holes

content.label: Erosion Check: SE must FIT inside the object

highlight.meaning: The entire 3x3 SE is placed over the image. For output to be 1, all highlighted 'SE' cells must correspond to '1' in the image.

content.label: Dilation Check: SE must HIT the object

highlight.meaning: The 3x3 SE is centered on a pixel. For output to be 1, at least one highlighted 'SE' cell must correspond to a '1' in the image.
